topWin: Theme persistence is now browser-verified in Chromium, and the rank/public-boundary cleanup removed two durable sources of future drift from the repo.
topGap: The authenticated entitlement lane still cannot produce live free-vs-Sparked-vs-Pro proof until the local shell can supply SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY for the magic-link helper.
ignisNote: Verification quality rises sharply when the repo can express both the feature rules and the exact authenticated proof path needed to validate them.
